---
title: "BS831_HW01.Rmd"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(Biobase)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Question 1

## Create an ExpressionSet object
```{r}
set.seed(123)

expr_matrix <- matrix(
  sample(1:100, 20),
  nrow = 5,
  ncol = 4,
  dimnames = list(
    paste0("Gene", 1:5),
    paste0("Sample", 1:4)
  )
)

pheno_data <- data.frame(
  condition = c("Healthy", "Healthy", "Diseased", "Diseased"),
  batch = c(1,1,2,2)
)
rownames(pheno_data) <- colnames(expr_matrix)

feature_data <- data.frame(
  gene_symbol = paste0("G", 1:5),
  chromosome = c("chr1","chr2","chr3","chr1","chrX")
)
rownames(feature_data) <- rownames(expr_matrix)

eset <- ExpressionSet(
  assayData = expr_matrix,
  phenoData = AnnotatedDataFrame(pheno_data),
  featureData = AnnotatedDataFrame(feature_data)
)

dim(eset)
```

## Snapshot

```{r}
exprs(eset)
pData(eset)
fData(eset)
```

## Interpretation
